description: Deploy or update an AWS CloudFormation stack as a Dagster asset.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Dagster asset name for this CloudFormation stack

template_url.label: Template Url
template_url.description: S3 URL to the CloudFormation template

parameters.label: Parameters
parameters.description: Stack parameters as a key/value dict.

region_name.label: Region Name
region_name.description: AWS region in which to manage the stack.

aws_profile.label: Aws Profile
aws_profile.description: AWS CLI profile name to use for credentials.

role_arn.label: Role Arn
role_arn.description: ARN of an IAM role for CloudFormation to assume when managing the stack.

on_failure.label: On Failure
on_failure.description: Action on stack creation failure: ROLLBACK, DO_NOTHING, or DELETE.

timeout_minutes.label: Timeout Minutes
timeout_minutes.description: Maximum minutes to wait for a stack operation to complete.

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names (team:analytics) or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset in the Dagster catalog, e.g. {"domain": "finance"}.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the Dagster catalog (e.g. snowflake, python). Auto-inferred from component name if empty.

freshness_max_lag_minutes.label: Freshness Max Lag (minutes)
freshness_max_lag_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before this asset is considered stale.

freshness_cron.label: Freshness Cron Schedule
freshness_cron.description: Cron schedule for the freshness policy, e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekdays 9am).

description.label: Description
description.description: Human-readable description of what this stack provisions.

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Dagster asset keys that this asset depends on

name: Cloudformation Asset
